nasb.text: We know our wickedness, O Lord, The iniquity of our fathers, for we have sinned against You.

esv.text: We acknowledge our wickedness, O Lord, and the iniquity of our fathers, for we have sinned against you.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！我們承認我們的罪惡， 和我們列祖的罪孽； 我們實在得罪了你。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，我们承认自己和我们祖先的罪， 我们都得罪了你。
